root.sql: SELECT sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no ) as memname , sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock FROM sc_mem_m_share_mem ,sc_acc_m_account_year WHERE 1=1 and sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock > 0 and sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no in ( select membership_no from sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail where item_type = 'WD' and operate_date between sc_acc_m_account_year.beginning_of_account and sc_acc_m_account_year.ending_of_account ) /*WHERE*/
